timeline.subject: conjecture(weak-pfr-symm): weak Polynomial Freiman-Ruzsa, the entropy route
formalize(entropy-basic): Shannon entropy and its basic inequalities
formalize(ruzsa-distance): the entropic Ruzsa distance and its triangle inequality

formalize(pfr-projection): the projection lemma onto a finite-index subgroup
formalize(torsion-dist-shrinking): Ruzsa distance shrinks under the torsion quotient
formalize(weak-pfr-symm): weak PFR (symmetric form), everything compiles!
formalize(weak-pfr-int): weak PFR over the integers
formalize(pfr-int-strong): a downstream corollary that uses weak PFR over Z

nodes.statement: The approximate-entropy PFR inequality. Its proof unfolds the tau-functional minimiser's definition body.
Shannon entropy and its basic inequalities.
A downstream corollary that uses weak PFR over the integers (own proof clean, but it rests on the contaminated strand).
The projection lemma onto a finite-index subgroup.
The entropic Ruzsa distance and its triangle inequality.
The entropic Ruzsa distance shrinks under the torsion quotient.
Weak Polynomial Freiman-Ruzsa (symmetric form): a set with small doubling is covered by few translates of a coset of a subgroup.
